title: Edge 16x - PvP Pack
description: A PvP Pack that gives you max fps and pvp look in Minecraft. Also best for survival
body:
# **🚀 Edge 16x - High Performance PvP Pack ⚔️**


Edge 16x is a lightweight, competitive resource pack built for Minecraft Java Edition. This pack is designed for players who want a clean look and a significant FPS boost during intense PvP battles.

✨ Current Features:

🚀 Maximum FPS: Optimized 16x textures to reduce lag and stutters.

⚔️ Short Swords: Better screen visibility with shortened weapon models.

🎨 Clean Textures: Simplified blocks and items for a distraction-free experience.

🔍 Competitive Edge: Focused on clarity to help you spot enemies faster.
